article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer mark his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with notable industry figures such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, resulting in a distinctive sound that has garnered attention within electronic music circles.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, offering insight into the tools behind his productions.

His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
